M0620_BEH_PROB_FRQ (M0620) Frequency of Behavior Problems Frequency of behavior problems. 00 = Never
01 = Less than once a month
02 = Once a month
03 = Several times each month
04 = Several times a week
05 = At least daily. CHAR 2 x x
M0630_REC_PSYCH (M0630) Psychiatric Nursing Services Is patient receiving psychiatric nursing services at home provided by a qualified psychiatric nurse? 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x
